reference: This looks like degenerative changes to an arthritic joint. Apply warm packs, avoid squatting, kneeling, and cross-legged sitting. If you have a lot of pain, arthroscopic debridement can be performed to remove any bony debris and injured meniscus.
text: This looks like degenerative changes to an arthritic joint. Apply warm packs. Avoid squatting, kneeling, and cross-legged sitting. If you have a lot of pain, arthroscopic debriement can be performed to remove any bony debris and injured meniscus.
